title: taraxacum geminatum
intro: Taraxacum geminatum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum geminatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
